stemHtml: To which categories of aircraft is regulation 965/2012 applicable?

options.a: Only motor-powered aircraft involved in Commercial Air Transport operations (CAT).
options.b: Motor-powered aircraft involved in Commercial Air Transport operations (CAT) and complex and other than complex motor-powered aircraft involved in non-commercial operations.
options.c: Complex and other than complex motor-powered aircraft involved in non-commercial operations.
options.d: Motor-powered and non motor-powered aircraft involved in Commercial Air Transport operations.
